chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D - 1210 of 2023. 1.For orders on o/obj. at Flag.A. 2.For Hearing of CMA 5062/2023. 3.For Hearing of main case. - 18.10.2023. Sultan Ahmed Lashari, Advocate, for the Petitioner. Dareshani Ali Hyder Ada, DAG. - The petitioner claims to be an employee of the Zarai Taraqiati Bank Limited, and has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution impugning a letter dated 26.07.2023 issued by one of its functionaries. A perusal of the letter in question reflects that an earlier enquiry ordered against several employees, including the petitioner, has thereby been quashed and a fresh inquiry ordered to be carried out by 3-member Enquiry Committee constituted for that purpose. As such, in the absence of a definitive action, the impugned letter does not of itself give rise to a grievance constituting a fit case for issuance of a writ. That being so, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly along with the listed miscellaneous application. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
